creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
Created attachment 151972
x11-themes/kde-icons-graphite-rade8 svn diff

x11-themes/kde-icons-graphite-rade8
fixes MASTER_SITES as reported by
http://beefy1.isc.freebsd.org/bulk/93i386-default/latest/logs/errors/kde-icons-graphite-rade8-3.1.log
and
http://portsmon.FreeBSD.org/portoverview.py?category=x11-themes&portname=kde-icons-graphite-rade8

This appears to be an issue with the SF logic in the ports system
*not* the port, itself.

Please find svn diff, and QA session, attached to this pr(1).

GO ahead, and list me as MAINTAINER, if need be.

Thanks.

--Chris
